chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 786 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 09.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present for the applicant. However, learned Deputy Prosecutor General states that the trial has since been concluded. On the earlier date, learned Counsel had contended that the matter is fixed for judgment. Irrespective to the same, bail application stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
